description: CompositionRed T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has a ribbed crew-neck with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, distressed look graphic print on the front and back, club logo helow the neckline on the back and swoosh logo towards the left hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not dry cleanDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not iron on print or embroideryThis manchester united T-shirt from nike is an exclusive club prodcut created for hard core Man Utd fans. The classic, comfortable Fit is complemented by the fabric made of certified organic cotton, thereby providing all day comfort. The distressed look graphic lettering of the word "United" on the front and "The Red Devils - 1878" on the back in the form of square metal studs with the club seal below the back neck adds to the aggressive appeal of the tee. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes to support the team on and off the field.
